# tests/lintian/baseline.txt
#
# Allowlist of known/accepted lintian E: and W: lines on the built ISO.
# Generated by `tests/lintian/run-lintian.sh` on first run.
# Every entry should have a comment explaining WHY it is accepted.
#
# Format: full lintian output line, one per row, sorted by tag.

# (empty until the first ISO build populates it)
